name: Improper Neutralization of Value Delimiters
description: The product does not properly neutralize characters that function as value delimiters (e.g., '=' separating key from value, quotes around values) in user input, allowing attackers to alter value boundaries and inject malicious content.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing value delimiter characters that flows into TRANSFORM[value_construction] without a TRANSFORM[value_delimiter_escape] node that escapes or encodes the delimiter characters before they reach the downstream parser
